local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local lp = Players.LocalPlayer
local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera

------------------------------------------------
-- CAMERA LOCK
------------------------------------------------

camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable

------------------------------------------------
-- CHARACTER
------------------------------------------------

local character = lp.Character or lp.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local hrp = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

------------------------------------------------
-- INVISIBLE ANCHOR (LOCKED ON SPAWN POSITION)
------------------------------------------------

local anchor = Instance.new("Part")
anchor.Name = "CutsceneAnchor"
anchor.Size = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
anchor.Anchored = true
anchor.CanCollide = false
anchor.Transparency = 1 -- INVISIBLE NOW
anchor.Parent = workspace

-- 🔥 IMPORTANT FIX: SNAP ONCE, NOT FOLLOW
anchor.CFrame = hrp.CFrame

------------------------------------------------
-- PLAYBACK STATE
------------------------------------------------

local index = 1
local t = 0
local speed = 160

local conn
conn = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(dt)

	if index >= #cameraFrames then
		conn:Disconnect()
		camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
		return
	end

	t += dt * speed

	-- rebuild world-space from fixed anchor
	local a = anchor.CFrame * cameraFrames[index]
	local b = anchor.CFrame * cameraFrames[index + 1]

	camera.CFrame = a:Lerp(b, math.clamp(t, 0, 1))

	if t >= 1 then
		index += 1
		t = 0
	end
end)







local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local character = Players.LocalPlayer.Character
local hum = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local hrp = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

-- store original states
local oldAutoRotate = hum.AutoRotate
local oldSit = hum.Sit

-- stop all animations
for _, v in ipairs(hum:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do
	v:Stop(0)
end

-- disable physics control
hum.Sit = true
hum.AutoRotate = false
hum.PlatformStand = true

hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
hrp.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero

-- ghost mode
local originalCollisions = {}

local function setGhost(state)
	for _, obj in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
		if obj:IsA("BasePart") then
			if state then
				originalCollisions[obj] = obj.CanCollide
				obj.CanCollide = false
				obj.Massless = true
			else
				if originalCollisions[obj] ~= nil then
					obj.CanCollide = originalCollisions[obj]
				end
				obj.Massless = false
			end
		end
	end
end

setGhost(true)

-- animation (optional placeholder)
local animation = Instance.new("Animation")
animation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://0"
local track = hum:LoadAnimation(animation)
track:Play(1, 5, 1)
track:AdjustSpeed(0.01)

-- checkpoint target
local checkpoint = Instance.new("Part")
checkpoint.Size = hrp.Size
checkpoint.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
checkpoint.Anchored = true
checkpoint.CanCollide = false
checkpoint.Transparency = 1
checkpoint.Parent = workspace

-- YOUR FRAMES

	CFrame.new(152.748627,440.396851,139.044403,0.087592,-0.259802,0.961681,0.154635,0.957235,0.244517,-0.984081,0.127292,0.124021),
	CFrame.new(152.627716,440.492157,138.750931,0.398843,-0.157214,0.903442,0.108455,0.986367,0.123765,-0.910583,0.048620,0.410456)
}

-- transform helper
local origin = frames[1]:Inverse()
local startCFrame = hrp.CFrame

local function getRelative(cf)
	return startCFrame * (origin * cf)
end

-- FIXED SEQUENCE CONTROL
local index = 3
local t = 0
local speed = 55
local finished = false

local conn
conn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
	if finished then return end

	if index >= #frames then
		finished = true
		conn:Disconnect()

		track:Stop()

		-- stabilize before final tween
		hrp.Anchored = true
		hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
		hrp.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero

		local tween = TweenService:Create(
			hrp,
			TweenInfo.new(0.1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
			{CFrame = checkpoint.CFrame}
		)

		tween:Play()
		tween.Completed:Wait()

		checkpoint:Destroy()

		-- restore state
		hrp.Anchored = false
		setGhost(false)

		hum.PlatformStand = false
		hum.Sit = oldSit
		hum.AutoRotate = oldAutoRotate

		return
	end

	t += dt * speed

	local a = getRelative(frames[index])
	local b = getRelative(frames[index + 1])

	local alpha = math.clamp(t, 0, 1)
	hrp.CFrame = a:Lerp(b, alpha)

	hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
	hrp.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero

	if t >= 1 then
		index += 1
		t = 0
	end
end)
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")

local function playAnimation(id, fadeTime, timePos, speed, duration)
local animation = Instance.new("Animation")
animation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://" .. id

local track = humanoid:LoadAnimation(animation)

track:Play(fadeTime)

if timePos then
track.TimePosition = timePos
end

track:AdjustSpeed(speed or 1)

if duration then
task.delay(duration, function()
track:Stop(fadeTime)
end)
end

return track
end

task.spawn(function()
playAnimation(118959209918644, 0.5, 0, 1, 1.3)
task.wait(1.3)

playAnimation(126466547124534, 0.5, 0, 0.4, 1)
task.wait(1)

playAnimation(72302379434499, 0.5, 1, 0, 1)
task.wait(0.5)

playAnimation(78724106259677, 1, 0, 1, 1)
task.wait(1)

playAnimation(110361063508944, 0.5, 0.1, 0.3, 3.3)
end)

Wait(2)
function GetGitSoundID(GithubSnd, SoundName)
SoundName = tostring(SoundName)
local url = GithubSnd
local FileName = SoundName
writefile("customObject_Sound_" .. FileName .. ".mp3", game:HttpGet(url))
if getcustomasset then
return getcustomasset("customObject_Sound_" .. FileName .. ".mp3")
elseif getsynasset then
return getsynasset("customObject_Sound_" .. FileName .. ".mp3")
else
warn("getcustomasset/getsynasset not available")
return nil
end
end

function sfx(id, p, d)
if not id then
warn("Invalid Sound ID")
return
end
local SlashSound = Instance.new("Sound")
SlashSound.SoundId = id
SlashSound.Parent = p
SlashSound.Volume = 4
if d then
game.Debris:AddItem(SlashSound, 40)
end
SlashSound:Play()
return SlashSound
end

function getsfxid(id)
local hi = nil
if id == "clang" then
hi = "rbxassetid://495135507"
elseif id == "Slap" then
hi = GetGitSoundID("https://github.com/Themindofneo/neo-s-slashing-demise/raw/refs/heads/main/kj-slap-made-with-Voicemod.mp3")
end
return hi and tostring(hi) or nil
end

sfx(getsfxid("Slap"), workspace, true)
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")


local frameTime = 0.05
local loop = false

local images = {
	"rbxassetid://18439449672",
	"rbxassetid://18439449322",
	"rbxassetid://18439449322",
	"rbxassetid://18439448827",
	"rbxassetid://18439448569",
	"rbxassetid://18439448569",
	"rbxassetid://18439447816",
	"rbxassetid://18439447528",
	"rbxassetid://18439448279",
	"rbxassetid://18439447248",
	"rbxassetid://18439446937",
	"rbxassetid://18439446621",
	"rbxassetid://18439446312",
	"rbxassetid://18439445892",
	"rbxassetid://18439445892",
	"rbxassetid://18439445557",
	"rbxassetid://18439445220",
	"rbxassetid://18439444854",
	"rbxassetid://18439444197",
	"rbxassetid://18439443091",
	"18439442732",
	"18439442280",
	"18439439276",
	"18439438892",
	"18439438588",
	"18439438325",
	"18439437897",
	"18439437436",
	"18439436945",
	"18439436647",
	"18439418311",
	"18439436436",
	"18439436154",
	"18439435078",
	"18439434365",
	"18439433887",
	"18439432512",
	"18439432070",
	"18439430917",
	"18439430536",
	"18439430081",
	"18439424913",
	"18439424277",
	"18439423074",
	"18439423074",
	"18439422402",
	"18439422036",
	"18439421605",
	"18439420101",
	"18439421256",
	"18439420496",
}

local screenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
screenGui.Name = "StackedImageCutscene"
screenGui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
screenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
screenGui.Parent = playerGui

local layers = {}

local function createLayer(imageId)
	if not imageId:find("rbxassetid://") then
		imageId = "rbxassetid://" .. imageId
	end

	local img = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	img.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	img.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
	img.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	img.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	img.Image = imageId
	img.Parent = screenGui

	return img
end

task.spawn(function()
	repeat
		for i = 1, #images do			
			local layer = createLayer(images[i])
			table.insert(layers, layer)

			task.wait(frameTime)
		end
	until not loop
	for _, layer in ipairs(layers) do
		layer:Destroy()
	end
	screenGui:Destroy()
end)
